Skill Path: Spellcraft (Religion)

Your excellent knowledge of spells helps you identifying spells with great success.

While developing your skills in Religion you chose to focus specifically on Spellcraft (Religion), learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.MjQyTcV8Jiv1Jtln]{Recognize Spell}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.v7Bt6hjmzYnLFLeG]{Magical Shorthand}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Q5iIYCFdqJFM31GW]{Learn a Spell}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.MjQyTcV8Jiv1Jtln]{Recognize Spell}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.v7Bt6hjmzYnLFLeG]{Magical Shorthand}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-skillpaths.pf2e-skillpath-compendium.Item.9drUkZpowfoQe48W]{Spell Reconstruction}
  • Master: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.2rSyTfPgAmNAo01r]{Quick Recognition}
  • Legendary: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.dYMxP8SsHrwOze8v]{Divine Guidance}
